---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for Heisenberg Team
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Goal
What do you want to achieve?

## Problem
What limitation or friction exists today?

## Proposed Change
Describe the feature, workflow, or UX change you want.

## Why It Matters
Who benefits, and how?

## Scope
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Setup or installer
- [ ] Agent behavior
- [ ] Skills library
- [ ] Monitoring or operations
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context
Links, screenshots, references, or examples.
